name: pareto
description: A library that supports the Pareto programming style: 80% of the code is straightforward and only needs 20% (or less) of all language features

scripts.pubMin: git diff --exit-code && npm run u2l && rd /s /q .\dist && tsc && npm run lint && npm run test && npm version minor && git push && npm publish
scripts.pubPatch: git diff --exit-code && npm run u2l && rd /s /q .\dist && tsc && npm run lint && npm run test && npm version patch && git push && npm publish

author: corno
